stories.title: NBA playoff takeaways: Thunder roll to victory ove...
stories.summary: Here's what has stood out from the latest playoff games of the second round.

stories.title: Thunder roll past Lakers in Game 1 of West semis
stories.summary: The Thunder cruised past the Lakers to open their Western Conference semifinals series, even though Shai Gilgeous-Alexander scored fewer points and committed more turnovers than he had in any other game this season.

stories.title: Pistons pull away from Cavs to take Game 1
stories.summary: Cade Cunningham scored 23 points, Tobias Harris had 20, and the Pistons beat the Cavaliers 111-101 on Tuesday night in Game 1 of their second-round series.

stories.title: Cavs' Mitchell on not getting to line: 'I don't fl...
stories.summary: Asked to pinpoint Tuesday night why he wasn't getting to the free throw line during the playoffs as much as he was during the regular season, Cavaliers star Donovan Mitchell offered up, "I don't flop, maybe that's why."

stories.title: Diggs found not guilty of assault, strangulation
stories.summary: A jury found former New England Patriots receiver Stefon Diggs not guilty on charges of felony strangulation and misdemeanor assault and battery on Tuesday.
